codeReview.summary: Well-implemented cross-surface consistency feature that correctly addresses VAL-CROSS-005 (support ticket visibility) and VAL-CROSS-006 (credit request visibility). The implementation adds GitHub linkage error handling in TicketDetailPage and SupportTicketsPage, displays publicId references in DealerCreditRequestsPage for cross-surface tracing, and surfaces the credit request reason in Sales CreditRequestsPage. All 19 new tests pass and cover the required cross-surface behavior. Code follows existing patterns and is maintainable.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The GitHub linkage fields (githubIssueNumber, githubIssueUrl, githubIssueState, githubLastError) are already defined in the TicketDto type in src/types/index.ts, indicating prior backend alignment. Worker correctly used these existing fields without modification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/types/index.ts defines all GitHub linkage fields on the Ticket interface

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the frontend-workflow-worker procedure correctly: read mission docs, implemented the workflow with maintainable API wiring, ran targeted tests, and completed all required validators (lint, typecheck, test). No skill gaps identified.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure = true, all validators passed with exitCode 0

summary: PASS - Clean implementation of cross-surface consistency for support tickets and credit requests. The changes correctly expose GitHub linkage errors while keeping local tickets visible (VAL-CROSS-005), and display publicId references and reason text across Dealer, Sales, and Admin surfaces (VAL-CROSS-006). All 19 new tests pass and the code maintains consistency with existing patterns. No blocking issues found.
